sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS overlap_count FROM datastore:substage_annotations_v4 WHERE layer_id = :layer_id AND COALESCE(status, 'active') = 'active' AND annotation_type = 'window' AND annotation_id <> :annotation_id AND CAST(start_time AS timestamp) < CAST(:end_time AS timestamp) AND CAST(end_time AS timestamp) > CAST(:start_time AS timestamp)) q
